description: Manual reader-value validation set. Labels are editorial judgements for historical candidates: useful, neutral, should_not_include.

labels.title: Weather placeholder for 2026-05-18
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Daily weather is practical and expected in the digest.

labels.title: The two huge billion-pound Greater Manchester projects at the heart of a new masterplan
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Large local investment projects have broad civic and jobs relevance.

labels.title: 'It's killed me to ask him if he wants to die, but he doesn't - he wants to fight'
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Human-impact NHS and care story with strong local relevance.

labels.title: Makerfield by-election LIVE as Andy Burnham allies in furious row and Angela Rayner rejects role
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Major regional political story involving the GM mayor.

labels.title: 'People were throwing chairs. It was complete chaos': Police called to Trafford Centre as ‘fights' break out
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Public-order incident at a major local destination is immediately relevant.

labels.title: Pedestrian seriously injured in Manchester city centre horror as car smashes into island
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Serious city-centre collision is safety-relevant and local.

labels.title: They cradled his head as he lay bleeding to death, knowing nothing of a brutal attack minutes earlier
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Fatal stabbing with local investigation context should be included.

labels.title: Tragedy as man found dead by passing jogger near Prestwich Clough before body pulled from water
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Local death investigation is a clear news item, not filler.

labels.title: The fight over Hopwood Hall
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Historic building dispute with council involvement has local civic value.

labels.title: Bury primary school teaching assistant jailed after pleading guilty to child sex offences
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Court outcome involving a school worker is important and specific.

labels.title: Outwood Road, Radcliffe - Bus Diversion
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Live bus diversion is practical commute information.

labels.title: Liverpool Road, Eccles - Bus Stop Closure
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Bus stop closure affects local journeys directly.

labels.title: TransPennine Express: Disruption between Rochdale and Manchester Victoria
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Rail disruption on a GM route is high reader value.

labels.title: NQ fave Trof to re-open as The Trof Pub & Dining Room
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Specific Manchester reopening with place and timing is useful lifestyle news.

labels.title: Legendary Manchester bakery Gooey opens second cafe on Oxford Road
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Specific new opening in a central location is useful for readers.

labels.title: manchester jazz festival Takeover at Aviva Studios
labels.label: useful
labels.rationale: Specific weekend cultural event with clear venue value.

labels.title: HMRC names and shames seven Greater Manchester firms and people
labels.reject_reason: Intra-batch topic duplicate — same story kept from stronger source.
labels.label: should_not_include
labels.rationale: Duplicate candidate; the underlying topic may be useful, but this item should not occupy another slot.

labels.title: He failed his A Levels and can't spell - but now runs his own company
labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Human-interest local story, but less practical than civic, safety, or transport items.

labels.title: Reform's new Rochdale boss - who might be gone in 12 months - on immigration, the cost of living crisis and housing
labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Local politics profile has some value but is not essential daily utility.

labels.title: Is it too expensive to be a student in Manchester now?
labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Relevant local issue, but more analysis than immediate action.

labels.title: Bishop of Salford starts bid to make Manchester man, 21, a saint
labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Distinct local human-interest story, not broadly practical.

labels.title: Police urgently appeal for footage after fatal stabbing in Moss Side
labels.reject_reason: Collected from live source; pending dedupe review.
labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Potentially useful appeal, but pending dedupe means it may duplicate a stronger crime item.

labels.title: No trams to run on major Greater Manchester line for two weeks as part of £150m improvement works
labels.reject_reason: draft_line for long-format category needs ≥2 sentences (got 1).
labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Underlying disruption is useful, but this item failed rendering and likely overlaps transport sources.

labels.title: Renters' Rights Act comes into force - what it means for Manchester renters | Manchester City Council
labels.reject_reason: Без новых фактов: уже был 2026-05-13 как «Renters' Rights Act comes into force - what it means for Manchester renters | Manchester City Council».
labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Important civic topic, but no new facts on this run.

labels.label: neutral
labels.rationale: Potentially useful opening, but needs dedupe/newness confirmation.

labels.rationale: Legitimate event listing, useful for some readers but not essential.

labels.title: Lost Girl

labels.title: The uncomfortable truth behind Greater Manchester's local election results

labels.label: should_not_include
labels.rationale: Rehash of already published election analysis without new facts.

labels.title: 'I became a bus driver in Manchester - now people know me from TikTok'

labels.rationale: Human-interest repeat with no new development.

labels.title: 'Andy Burnham once came into our pub and we made him pull his own pint'

labels.label: should_not_include
labels.rationale: Light feature repeat, not worth a daily digest slot.
